events.text: Something molten skitters out of the ash.
a slag-fused coin-purse cooling in the cinders
a scatter of coins dropped by some scorched prospector
a smelt-cache prised from beneath a toppled basalt pillar
a cool fumarole venting clean steam
a seep of quench-water trapped in black glass
a shaded hollow where the ashfall cannot reach
a thin crust gives way over a pocket of embers
a vent of scalding gas hisses up around your boots
a sinkhole of loose cinder swallows you to the knee
a scorched waystone, its rune worn to a coiled, serpentine shape.
the ground shudders with a low note from the caldera, like something vast turning in its sleep.
a soot-drawn sketch pinned to a spire: a stair of glowing rock descending into a great open maw.
a ring of fused glass where the ash runs molten, the air above it shimmering.
a prospector's cairn marking the caldera road, three blackened skulls set facing the deep as warning.
ash-singers swear the slag rivers have no source, and that on still nights they breathe.
